title: Multiple views for a connected dashboard
excerpt: Allow users to create multiple views for a connected dashboard. This would act similarly to the way a regular board allows you to make new views. I do not like having to shoehorn and wedge a bunch of widgets together on …

posts.author: cfisher (Chuck F)
posts.cookedHtml:
Allow users to create multiple views for a connected dashboard. This would act similarly to the way a regular board allows you to make new views. I do not like having to shoehorn and wedge a bunch of widgets together on one page in a dashboard.

An example of a use case:
I would like to have a full page Overview widget displayed. I would also like a full page Calendar view. I do not want to have to scroll inside of one view or inside a widget.
